title: [BUG] spliceRows无法正确删除
body:
我的表格中结构是这样的[
  <1 empty item>,
  [ <1 empty item>, 1 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 2 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 3 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 4 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 5 ]
]，我使用  worksheet.spliceRows(3, 2);删除后结果是[
  <1 empty item>,
  [ <1 empty item>, 1 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 2 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 5 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 4 ]
]我是用  worksheet.spliceRows(3, 1);两次的结果是[
  <1 empty item>,
  [ <1 empty item>, 1 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 2 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 5 ],
  []
]也不对，我想他的结果是[
  <1 empty item>,
  [ <1 empty item>, 1 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 2 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 4 ],
  [ <1 empty item>, 5 ],
  ]
